ddt:Target.Name: CDM_Sweet400_V2.1
ddt:Target.Description:
Initial Creation. V1.0 From Sweet_200_V2.4 (no modification, only rename and applicability for Sweet 400 xDD and xCB)
V2.0
XBGph2 applicability added .

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding Gen Failure Info
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level outofrange 0 adjust failure
signal has too few transitions events
signal has too many transitions events
alive sequence counter incorrect not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: Electrical system S / ABS control - Initial state (control application inactive)(00h)
Electrically controlled S / ABS control - Normal control 2(02h)
Electrically controlled S / ABS control - Normal control 3(03h)
Electrically controlled S / ABS control - Normal control 4(04h)
Electrically controlled S / ABS control -CAN input signal abnormality detection(09h)
(TBD)S/ABS control - initial state (there is no ESA control application operation demand)(00h)
(TBD)S/ABS control - ESA control application operation demand(01h)

Data.Name: VMC_status.Flag for assistance operation of effective break feeling

Item.Text: EVC Not available as an actuator

Data.Name: Step on brake notice request flag

Item.Text: No warning Vehicle not immobilized display request(00h)
Warning Vehicle not immobilized display request(01h)

Data.Name: SSA_MS_SW_STAT.Select state flag of SSA ON / OFF
SSA LED2 (In hard LED3) lighting request
Output_SSAAutomatic brake hold SW lamp active.param

Item.Text: VMC Left revolution operation display On
VMC Right revolution operation display On

Data.Name: SSA active test 1 (SSA lamp driving force execution state
SSA active test 2 (SSA switch lamp execution state
Target command current FL for arbitration
Target command current FR for arbitration
Target command current RL for arbitration
Target command current RR for arbitration

Item.Text: OutputControl.SSA active test 1 (SSA lamp driving force execution state
OutputControl.SSA active test 2 (SSA switch lamp execution state
FR + RR SENSORS + IPA + PSM + FKP(03h)
NO EMERGENCY ASSIST FOR PEDAL MISAPPLICATION(00h)
WITH EMERGENCY ASSIST FOR PEDAL MISAPPLICATION(01h)

Data.Name: Electric throttle control status.ETC fail flag

Item.Text: exact torque request can not be achieved (measure imprecision)
transcient state preventing torque request realization
torque request can not be achieved
CC ON and ( awaiting or suspended)

Data.Name: Input_SSAAutomatic brake hold SW lamp active.param

Item.Text: VMC Left revolution operation display On
VMC Right revolution operation display On
Power B CABIN IGN Relay Drive
Power B Auto ACC Relay Drive
Activate the Roller Bench mode for 4WS
Inhibit manually the Roller Bench mode
ABS control-initial state (control application not activated)
ABS control-CAN input signal abnormality detection
ABS control-initial state (ESA control application operation request not required)
ABS control-ESA control app operation request
ABS control-horizontal motion estimation accuracy decrease undetected state
ABS control-horizontal motion estimation accuracy decrease detection state
ABS control-estimated accuracy drop undetected state
ABS control-estimated accuracy drop detection status
ABS control-Vehicle speed estimation accuracy decrease undetected state
ABS control-Vehicle speed estimation accuracy drop detection status
ABS control-Stop judgment control No cut request
ABS control-Stop judgment control Cut request
Power B CABIN IGN Relay Drive
Power B Auto ACC Relay Drive
OutputControl.SSA active test 1 (SSA lamp driving force execution state
OutputControl.SSA active test 2 (SSA switch lamp execution state
Roller Bench Mode Manual Inhibition not active
Roller Bench Mode Manual Inhibition Activate

Data.Name: ADA2_Status1.DECLMT Torque Output Request to ARB

Item.Text: Not Not available (init or lever switched failure)
AD/RPK OFF + TD or MRM in regulation
AD2 L2 regulation + TD or MRM in regulation
AD1 L3 regulation + TD or MRM in regulation
RPK regulation + TD or MRM in regulation
AD/RPK OFF + TD or MRM in regulation
AD2 L2 regulation + TD or MRM in regulation
AD1 L3 regulation + TD or MRM in regulation
RPK regulation + TD or MRM in regulation
AD/RPK OFF + TD or MRM in regulation
AD2 L2 regulation + TD or MRM in regulation
AD1 L3 regulation + TD or MRM in regulation
RPK regulation + TD or MRM in regulation

Data.Name: Fixed current active test execution state
Control module malfunction status.CDM fail flag

Item.Text: Sleep or Crank fault, Disable DiagMuxDTC

Data.Name: Control module malfunction status.Master warning lamp command state
RoutineIdentifierList
Data.Comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

DataItem.Name: Electric throttle control status.ETC fail flag
VMC_status.Flag for assistance operation of effective break feeling
